title: Crunchy Thai Date Crumble
description: A graham cracker and date-based dessert that is both crunchy and vegan-friendly for a perfect snack or sweet end to your meal.
instructions: Combine the graham cracker crumbs, chopped dates, almond butter, honey or agave syrup, coconut oil, cinnamon, and a pinch of salt in a mixing bowl.
Use hands to mix everything until it forms a soft dough. Roll out small balls using your hands, then place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the edges start to brown slightly. Let cool completely before serving.
Optional: Dust with powdered sugar and sprinkle crushed peanuts for an extra crunch.
